description_long: This is a modern, minimalist shelving unit featuring four evenly spaced horizontal shelves supported by two vertical side rails. The structure is open on all sides, allowing for easy access and visibility of items placed on the shelves. The shelves and rails appear to be constructed from a smooth, metallic material, likely steel or aluminum, giving the unit a sleek and industrial look. The design is simple and functional, with no visible doors, handles, or decorative elements. The overall form is rectangular, with the shelves projecting outward from the vertical supports. This type of shelving is suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or public spaces where open storage is needed.
description: A sleek, open-frame metal shelving unit with four horizontal shelves and two vertical supports, designed for modern urban spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing four evenly spaced shelves supported by two vertical rails.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the shelves and the depth of the unit.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the shelf arrangement and support structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again highlighting the slim depth and open construction.
